headline: From clay body to final kiln

gallery.alt: Hands shaping clay on a pottery wheel.
Glaze being brushed onto a ceramic bowl.
Kiln shelves with pieces ready to fire.

steps.title: Forming
steps.description: Each object starts on the wheel or in slab construction, then rests to leather-hard.

steps.title: Trimming and bisque
steps.description: We refine foot rings, balance weight, and perform the first low-temperature firing.

steps.title: Glazing
steps.description: Glaze is layered by dip and brush to create depth while preserving tactility.

steps.title: High-fire finish
steps.description: Final firing vitrifies the piece, locking in durability and a distinct surface response.
